mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, content, cover_img, excerpt, state, category_id, create_user, create_time, update_time, view_count, like_count, comment_count, favorite_count) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{coverImg}, #{excerpt}, #{state}, #{categoryId}, #{createUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, 0, 0, 0, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.nickname AS author_name, u.user_pic AS author_avatar, c.category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.create_user = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_tag (article_id, tag_id, create_time) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{tagId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article a WHERE a.state = #{state}
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET hot_score = (like_count * 2 + favorite_count * 3 + comment_count * 1.5) / POWER(GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, create_time, NOW()), 1) + 1, 1.5) WHERE state = '已发布'
mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, u.nickname AS author_name, u.user_pic AS author_avatar, c.category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.create_user = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id IN
#{id}
